---
description: "Implement the highest-priority missing Gadgify feature end-to-end from plan docs"
agent: "expert-fullstack-dev"
argument-hint: "Feature name or domain, e.g. delivery dashboard, support tickets, refunds"
---

Implement one missing feature as a complete vertical slice.

Must follow:

- .github/instructions/\*.instructions.md
- .github/plan/\*.plan.md
- .github/roles/\*.role.md

Deliverables:

- backend route/controller/service/validator
- frontend api/hook/page or component
- i18n keys
- minimal verification via build/lint for touched areas
